events.event_description: U.S. Legation established in Chile when Heman Allen, Minister Plenipotentiary, presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Heman Allen, Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1823-01-27. Credentials presented: 1824-04-23. Presented recall on 1827-07-31.

events.event_description: U.S. mission elevated from Legation to Embassy when Henry Prather Fletcher was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote:
Henry Prather Fletcher, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1909-12-21. Credentials presented: 1910-09-09. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1914-11-19.

Henry Prather Fletcher, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1914-10-01. Credentials presented: 1914-11-19. Left Chile 1916-03-09.
